records.ety: [OE. thille, AS. <?/ille a board, plank, beam, thill; akin to <?/el a plank, D. deel a plank, floor, G. diele, OHG. dili, dilla, Icel. <?/ilja a plank, planking, a thwart, <?/ili a wainscot, plank; cf. Skr. tala a level surface. √236. Cf. Fill a thill, Deal a plank.]

defs: One of the two long pieces of wood, extending before a vehicle, between which a horse is hitched; a shaft.
The floor of a coal mine.
